title: 1 Bed 2 Baths Apartment
description:
Park City, Utah- Jan 17th- Jan 21th- (Martin Luther King Weekend) 
 Four Nights-One Bedroom/Two Bath Condo in Park Plaza Resort
Martin Luther King Week - Jan 17th – Jan 21th at the Park Plaza Ski Resort, a Premier Resort in Park City, Utah.
The Park Plaza Resort is a family friendly all-suite condo resort located in the center of Park City, Utah in Prospector Square just minutes from all three ski areas, Deer Valley, Park City and The Canyons. Restaurants, Shopping, and the Liquor Store are walkable. The resort has a courtesy shuttle service throughout town and to the ski resorts. The one-bedroom suite is extremely spacious, with two full bathrooms, a fully equipped kitchen and a dining area with a table that seats six. The unit is perfect for a getaway or family vacation.
Resort Amenities: Park Plaza is Park City's #1"Premier" family friendly resort! The Park Plaza features a sauna, fitness room, family recreational game room complete with an extra-large flat screen for movies, two smaller flat screens for gaming (Wii and Xbox), boardgames and popcorn machines. The indoor spa has been completely renovated. The rental includes full use of The Silver Mountain Spa located down the street. 
There are numerous sitting areas throughout the resort, a ping pong table, an outdoor barbeque area. Parking is underground and heated, plus there are heated ski lockers on the main floor. Park Plaza offers a 24-hourfront desk. Across the street are excellent restaurants: Fuego Bistro and Pizzeria, The Grub Steak Restaurant and a great Mexican restaurant, Nacho Mama.
Accommodations: Park Plaza's spacious rooms are comfortably furnished condo rentals and feature full sized kitchen in the one-bedroom. The Master bedroom has a king size bed and private bath. The living room has a queen size sofa bed with full bath. All the condos come with a fireplace and full balcony with complementary Wi-fi. Starter kits for coffee, tea, hot chocolate, and popcorn are placed in the kitchen as well.
Check out the Park Plaza atwww.latourhotelsandresorts.com for additional pictures and information.
The condo is being offered for $600 for 4 nights including all taxes. This is $2,000 less than if you booked the same condo directly with the resort if rooms were available.
Upon payment, buyer will receive a "Guest Confirmation" in their name from the resort.
Please do not hesitate to contact me if you have any questions.
Thanks,
Allen

title: 4 Beds 2 Baths Apartment
description:
Hi!!
FEMALE VILLAGE APARTMENT
I'm selling my apartment contract at The Village at South Campus, and honestly this place has been amazing!! I’m only leaving because I'm heading abroad this summer!

Available: April – August 14, 2026
✨ Option to renew for Fall if you love it and want to stay longer!
✨ April rent is already paid, so you'll get those extra days completely free!

Rent: $490/month + utilities (DISCOUNTED)

About the Apartment:
This is seriously such a great setup!
— Private room just for you
— In-unit laundry (no more laundromat runs!)
— Fully furnished with tons of kitchen cabinets and a balcony
— 10-minute walk to BYU campus (makes getting to class super easy)

— Games loft area

— Underground parking

My roommate and I are both going abroad, so if you want to move in with a friend let us know to get both of our contracts!

title: 3 Beds 2 Baths - Apartment
description:
5 BEDSPACES AVAILABLE THIS SPRING/SUMMER (MAY—AUG)!

Have your choice this summer with who you want to live with! One of my roommates is staying to work this summer. She’s the nicest and most funniest person ever, great roommate!

• West Campus of BYU (10min walk to campus)
• 15min drive to UVU (with bus stop right outside of apartment complex)
• Amazing ward with the best bishop (Ross Baron)!
• Fully-furnished apartment (including couch, chairs, table, tv, 2 fridges, dishwasher, etc)
• Mailboxes and Amazon Locker in apartment building
• Very social and fun environment. Glenwood puts on a few social party events in the summer, normally music, activities, food, etc. This last week they rented out a trampoline park for us! You will not be bored. The clubhouse has tv’s, arcade, billiard room, pool, hot tub, volleyball court, outside grill, and indoor gym!
• On-site laundry facilities in each apartment unit. Used mobile H-Wash app to pay. 
• Parking permits are $35/month (they do not oversell passed so you’re guaranteed a parking space which is right outside the apartment)
• After utilities and communications fees, along with renter’s liability (optional) fee, total rent cost is $553/month

On a personal note, I’ve been living here for two years now and have loved it! Management is okay and will get back to you pretty quick. I’ve only had problems with them really during White glove (move-out) cleaning check because they charged me for a hard water stain in the bathroom I was assigned to clean that was permanently there before I moved in. So, I suggest making notes and sending in a maintenance request on things they could potentially charge you for when you move in just so it’s on record when you move out or wish to renew. Other than that cleaning checks are once a month and they’re easily passable. If you do your cleaning assignment you’ll be totally fine:)

title: 2 Beds 1 Bath - Apartment
description:
Available immediately! Beautiful condo in a great south Springville location just off Main Street. Top floor unit with vaulted ceilings. Soothing gray colors, quartz counters, stainless kitchen appliances, washer and dryer provided. There is one reserved, covered parking spot for the condo and plenty of unreserved, uncovered parking. 

Available February 1, which means priority will be given to people who can move in promptly. If you don't intend to move until mid-March, please don't ask for a tour. :) 

Absolutely no pets or smoking/vaping. The building is a smoke-free property. Credit and background will be checked. We are willing to write a lease that ends in July or August (5-6 months) or to do a full-year lease. Equal housing opportunity, animals permitted as required by law. 

Tenants pay for electricity (there is no gas bill). The landlord pays the HOA fees which cover water, trash, and internet. You do have to provide your own router. There is no elevator in the building, so this unit is best for people who don't mind climbing stairs. 

We accept Zillow applications.

title: 2 Beds 1 Bath Apartment
description:
Enjoy living in a clean, quiet neighborhood surrounded by beautiful mountains on three sides. We'll rent as a single bedroom for $200 less, or as listed here as a 2-bedroom. To enter the second bedroom you must pass through the first. So fine for kids in the second room, but maybe not ideal for roommates.

We’re located right across the street from a historic park and within easy walking distance of Alpine Elementary, which offers a well‑regarded Chinese immersion program. The apartment includes blazing‑fast internet—perfect for Netflix and other streaming services (we’ll setup the secure network for you).

Rent is $1190 per month, with all utilities included for an additional $100 ($1,290 total).

While I wish I could make exceptions, I’m unable to rent to tenants with poor credit. I've learned from experience—after dozens of rentals—that people with poor credit often don't treat me well. (I really do wish that weren’t the case!)

No pets. No smoking. 

Photos may show some decorative items (like shower curtains, doormats, etc.) that aren’t included—they’re just examples of how you might personalize the space.

This rental runs for 13 or 14 months so that next time I rent in April or May. After that, renewal for a full year—or possibly month‑to‑month. We want rent by 3/15/26, so if you're looking a few months in advance, it might not be a good fit for us.

title: 1 Bed 1 Bath Apartment
description:
RENEWABLE FOR FALL!!
**Subleasing for the summer, but would be willing to negotiate a date before then!

This is a great apartment that would be perfect for someone moving to Provo for work/school/just for the social scene in the summer. Super close to the Provo library! The price listed is the total including utilities. This is my 3rd apartment in Provo and it's been my favorite by far. I am only looking to sublease because I will be spending the summer at home because my brother is leaving on a mission and I am working full-time there as well.

More info:
- Sharing with 3 other males
- HUGE underground parking lot (I have never not found a space during my time here)
- Top floor apartment (no upstairs neighbors)
- TONS of storage space (shelves, drawers, good size closet)
- In-unit laundry
- Great roommates (been friends with them for several years)
- Built-in desk in the room
- New flooring, countertops, and brand new couches
- Large kitchen
- UVX station right in front of the complex
- Super great people in the ward

Let me know if you're interested!
